prompt: Generate a screenshot of a digital order confirmation on subscribing "Cursor IDE AI Service Plan, 20USD/month". Use the clean, minimal UI style and card layout inspired by the receipt reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a digital order confirmation. The screen should confirm a subscription to the 'Cursor IDE AI Service Plan' for '$20/month'. Adopt the clean, minimalist UI style of image 1, featuring rounded rectangular cards on a light background. Place the primary service details, 'Cursor IDE AI Service Plan' and '$20/month', prominently in a large font within the top card, mirroring the presentation of the total amount in image 1. Within a secondary card, or a section below, include typical order confirmation elements such as an order ID, purchase date, and payment method, presented as clear key-value pairs, consistent with the structured details found in image 1.
objects: Prominent "Cursor IDE AI Service Plan" text in the top card
Prominent "$20/month" text in the top card
Smaller text indicating subscription confirmation (e.g., "Subscription Confirmed")
Structured key-value pair layout in a secondary card/section
